## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the existing patterns in the codebase
- [ ] No sensitive data (credentials, internal URLs, personal paths) in the changes
- [ ] If adding a new rule profile: tested the profile produces meaningful AI output
- [ ] If adding a new setting: added it to `package.json` `contributes.configuration` and updated the README table
